title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Empty
scenario: Home screen shows limited support popup for a newly released but unsupported device with empty LM version info after the launch date
steps: 1) Launch app and pair with headset. Expect green connection ring and black "i" icon.
2) Tap the "i" icon. Expect popup: "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited."
3) Tap outside popup. Expect popup closes.
expected: Home screen shows limited support with green connection ring, black "i" icon, and the popup displays "Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited." when tapping the "i" icon. Tapping outside dismisses the popup.
